mapper.select: /* statMgmtMapper.getInvPymDataCheck */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM CLS_SCHD_LOG WHERE SCHD_ID = 'INVPYMDATA' AND PROC_STAT_CD = 'P'

/* statMgmtMapper.getInvPymDataListExcel */ SELECT REGST_ID , TRGT_YM , STRT_YM , END_YM , STRT_YM || '~' || END_YM AS BILL_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , OPEN_DT , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0032', PPPO) AS PPPO , ENGG_MNTH_CNT , RATE_NM , INV_AMNT , PYM_AMNT , UNPD_AMNT , UNPD_RATIO || '%' AS UNPD_RATIO , UNPD_YN , COL_001, COL_002, COL_003, COL_004, COL_005, COL_006, COL_007, COL_008, COL_009, COL_010 , COL_011, COL_012, COL_013, COL_014, COL_015, COL_016, COL_017, COL_018, COL_019, COL_020 , COL_021, COL_022, COL_023, COL_024, COL_025, COL_026, COL_027, COL_028, COL_029, COL_030 , COL_031, COL_032, COL_033, COL_034, COL_035, COL_036, COL_037, COL_038, COL_039, COL_040 , COL_041, COL_042, COL_043, COL_044, COL_045, COL_046, COL_047, COL_048, COL_049, COL_050 , COL_051, COL_052, COL_053, COL_054, COL_055, COL_056, COL_057, COL_058, COL_059, COL_060 , COL_061, COL_062, COL_063, COL_064, COL_065, COL_066, COL_067, COL_068, COL_069, COL_070 , COL_071, COL_072, COL_073, COL_074, COL_075, COL_076, COL_077, COL_078, COL_079, COL_080 , COL_081, COL_082, COL_083, COL_084, COL_085, COL_086, COL_087, COL_088, COL_089, COL_090 , COL_091, COL_092, COL_093, COL_094, COL_095, COL_096, COL_097, COL_098, COL_099, COL_100 , COL_101, COL_102, COL_103, COL_104, COL_105, COL_106, COL_107, COL_108, COL_109, COL_110 , COL_111, COL_112, COL_113, COL_114, COL_115, COL_116, COL_117, COL_118, COL_119, COL_120 FROM TMP_INV_PYM_DATA WHERE REGST_ID = #{userId} AND TRGT_YM = #{trgtYm} AND STRT_YM = #{strtYm} AND END_YM = #{endYm}
mapper.insert: /* statMgmtMapper.insertUsgAmntSttc */ INSERT INTO MSP_USG_AMNT_STTC ( USG_YM, SVC_CNTR_NO, RATE_CD, CONTRACT_NUM , VC_USG_AMNT, VC_FREE_AMNT, VC_OVER_AMNT , SC_USG_AMNT, SC_FREE_AMNT, SC_OVER_AMNT , SMS_USG_CNT, SMS_FREE_CNT, SMS_OVER_CNT , MMS_USG_CNT, MMS_FREE_CNT, MMS_OVER_CNT , LMS_USG_CNT, LMS_FREE_CNT, LMS_OVER_CNT , DATA_USG_AMNT, DATA_FREE_AMNT, DATA_OVER_AMNT , ROAM_USG_AMNT, ROAM_FREE_AMNT, ROAM_OVER_AMNT , REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM ) SELECT A.USG_YM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , MIN(A.RATE_CD) AS RATE_CD , A.CONTRACT_NUM , SUM(A.VC_USG_AMNT) AS VC_USG_AMNT , SUM(A.VC_FREE_AMNT) AS VC_FREE_AMNT , SUM(A.VC_OVER_AMNT) AS VC_OVER_AMNT , SUM(A.SC_USG_AMNT) AS SC_USG_AMNT , SUM(A.SC_FREE_AMNT) AS SC_FREE_AMNT , SUM(A.SC_OVER_AMNT) AS SC_OVER_AMNT , SUM(A.SMS_USG_CNT) AS SMS_USG_CNT , SUM(A.SMS_FREE_CNT) AS SMS_FREE_CNT , SUM(A.SMS_OVER_CNT) AS SMS_OVER_CNT , SUM(A.MMS_USG_CNT) AS MMS_USG_CNT , SUM(A.MMS_FREE_CNT) AS MMS_FREE_CNT , SUM(A.MMS_OVER_CNT) AS MMS_OVER_CNT , SUM(A.LMS_USG_CNT) AS LMS_USG_CNT , SUM(A.LMS_FREE_CNT) AS LMS_FREE_CNT , SUM(A.LMS_OVER_CNT) AS LMS_OVER_CNT , SUM(A.DATA_USG_AMNT) AS DATA_USG_AMNT , SUM(A.DATA_FREE_AMNT) AS DATA_FREE_AMNT , SUM(A.DATA_OVER_AMNT) AS DATA_OVER_AMNT , SUM(A.ROAM_USG_AMNT) AS ROAM_USG_AMNT , SUM(A.ROAM_FREE_AMNT) AS ROAM_FREE_AMNT , SUM(A.ROAM_OVER_AMNT) AS ROAM_OVER_AMNT , #{USER_ID} , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(A.USE_DATE, 1, 6) AS USG_YM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , NVL(A.PRICE_PLAN_CD, 'X') AS RATE_CD , NVL(B.CONTRACT_NUM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO) AS CONTRACT_NUM , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'VIC', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'VC', A.PACKET_AMOUNT, 'VL', A.PACKET_AMOUNT, 0), 0)) AS VC_USG_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'VIC', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'VC', A.RC_AMOUNT, 'VL', A.RC_AMOUNT, 0), 0)) AS VC_FREE_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'VIC', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'VC', A.OC_AMOUNT, 'VL', A.OC_AMOUNT, 0), 0)) AS VC_OVER_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'VIC', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'SC', A.PACKET_AMOUNT, 'PS', A.PACKET_AMOUNT, 0), 0)) AS SC_USG_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'VIC', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'SC', A.RC_AMOUNT, 'PS', A.RC_AMOUNT, 0), 0)) AS SC_FREE_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'VIC', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'SC', A.OC_AMOUNT, 'PS', A.OC_AMOUNT, 0), 0)) AS SC_OVER_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'P2P', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'SM', A.TOTAL_COUNT, 0), 0)) AS SMS_USG_CNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'P2P', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'SM', A.RC_AMOUNT, 0), 0)) AS SMS_FREE_CNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'P2P', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'SM', A.OC_AMOUNT, 0), 0)) AS SMS_OVER_CNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'P2P', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'MM', A.TOTAL_COUNT, 0), 0)) AS MMS_USG_CNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'P2P', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'MM', A.RC_AMOUNT, 0), 0)) AS MMS_FREE_CNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'P2P', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'MM', A.OC_AMOUNT, 0), 0)) AS MMS_OVER_CNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'P2P', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'LM', A.TOTAL_COUNT, 0), 0)) AS LMS_USG_CNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'P2P', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'LM', A.RC_AMOUNT, 0), 0)) AS LMS_FREE_CNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'P2P', DECODE(A.SERVICE_TYPE, 'LM', A.OC_AMOUNT, 0), 0)) AS LMS_OVER_CNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'L7P', A.PACKET_AMOUNT, 0)) AS DATA_USG_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'L7P', A.RC_AMOUNT, 0)) AS DATA_FREE_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'L7P', A.OC_AMOUNT, 0)) AS DATA_OVER_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'SAL', A.PACKET_AMOUNT, 0)) AS ROAM_USG_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'SAL', A.RC_AMOUNT, 0)) AS ROAM_FREE_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.SERVICE_GUBN, 'SAL', A.OC_AMOUNT, 0)) AS ROAM_OVER_AMNT FROM CLS_AMOUNT_DATA A , ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = A.SVC_CNTR_NO UNION ALL SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM != A.SVC_CNTR_NO AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.EVNT_CD = 'MCN' ) B WHERE A.USE_DATE = #{WORK_YM} || '01' AND NVL(A.USER_START_TIME, 'X') != '19990101000000' AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO(+) GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.USE_DATE, 1, 6) , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , NVL(A.PRICE_PLAN_CD, 'X') , NVL(B.CONTRACT_NUM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO) ) A GROUP BY A.USG_YM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , A.CONTRACT_NUM

/* statMgmtMapper.insertInvAmntSttc */ INSERT INTO MSP_INV_AMNT_STTC ( BILL_YM, SVC_CNTR_NO, BILL_ACNT_NO, BILL_ITEM_CD, BILL_RFLC_IND_CD, PYMN_MTHD_CD, PYMN_DTL_MTHD_CD , CONTRACT_NUM, DUEDAT_DATE, APLY_DATE, PYM_APLY_DATE, BLPYM_DATE, ADJ_RSN_CD , INV_AMNT, INV_VAT , ADJ_AMNT, ADJ_VAT , PYM_AMNT, PYM_VAT , RFN_AMNT, RFN_VAT , FNTT_AMNT, FNTT_VAT , REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM ) SELECT INV.BILL_YM , INV.SVC_CNTR_NO , INV.BILL_ACNT_NO , INV.BILL_ITEM_CD , INV.BILL_RFLC_IND_CD , NVL(PYM.PYMN_MTHD_CD, 'X') AS PYMN_MTHD_CD , NVL(DECODE(PYM.PYMN_MTHD_CD, 'MR', DECODE(PYM.PYMN_DTL_MTHD_CD, 'SK', 'SKT', 'LG', 'LGT', PYM.PYMN_DTL_MTHD_CD), PYM.PYMN_DTL_MTHD_CD), 'X') AS PYMN_DTL_MTHD_CD , INV.CONTRACT_NUM , INV.DUEDAT_DATE , INV.APLY_DATE , PYM.APLY_DATE AS PYM_APLY_DATE , PYM.BLPYM_DATE , PYM.ADJS_RSN_CD , INV.INV_AMNT , INV.INV_VAT , INV.ADJR_AMNT - INV.ADJ_AMNT AS ADJ_AMNT , INV.ADJR_VAT - INV.ADJ_VAT AS ADJ_VAT , NVL(PYM.PYM_AMNT, 0) - NVL(PYM.BCK_AMNT, 0) AS PYM_AMNT , NVL(PYM.PYM_VAT,0) - NVL(PYM.BCK_VAT, 0) AS PYM_VAT , NVL(PYM.RFNR_AMNT,0) - NVL(PYM.RFN_AMNT, 0) AS RFN_AMNT , NVL(PYM.RFNR_VAT,0) - NVL(PYM.RFN_VAT, 0) AS RFN_VAT , NVL(PYM.FNTT_AMNT,0) - NVL(PYM.FNTF_AMNT, 0) AS FNTT_AMNT , NVL(PYM.FNTT_VAT,0) - NVL(PYM.FNTF_VAT, 0) AS FNTT_VAT , #{USER_ID} , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT A.BILL_YM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , A.BILL_ACNT_NO , A.SLS_CMPN_CD , A.BILL_ITEM_CD , A.BILL_RFLC_IND_CD , NVL(B.CONTRACT_NUM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO) AS CONTRACT_NUM , MAX(A.DUEDAT_DATE) DUEDAT_DATE , MAX(A.APLY_DATE) APLY_DATE , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'INV', A.PYMN_AMNT, 0)) AS INV_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'INV', A.VAT_AMNT, 0)) AS INV_VAT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'ADJ', A.PYMN_AMNT, 0)) AS ADJ_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'ADJ', A.VAT_AMNT, 0)) AS ADJ_VAT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'ADJR', A.PYMN_AMNT, 0)) AS ADJR_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'ADJR', A.VAT_AMNT, 0)) AS ADJR_VAT FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A , ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST A GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO ) B WHERE A.PYMN_CD IN ( 'INV', 'ADJ', 'ADJR' ) AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO(+) AND A.BILL_YM = #{WORK_YM} GROUP BY A.BILL_YM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , A.BILL_ACNT_NO , A.SLS_CMPN_CD , A.BILL_ITEM_CD , A.BILL_RFLC_IND_CD , NVL(B.CONTRACT_NUM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO) ) INV, ( SELECT A.BILL_YM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , A.BILL_ITEM_CD , A.BILL_RFLC_IND_CD , MAX(A.DUEDAT_DATE) DUEDAT_DATE , MAX(A.APLY_DATE) APLY_DATE , MAX(A.BLPYM_DATE) BLPYM_DATE , NVL(A.PYMN_MTHD_CD, 'X') PYMN_MTHD_CD , NVL(A.PYMN_DTL_MTHD_CD, 'X') PYMN_DTL_MTHD_CD , MAX(A.ADJS_RSN_CD) AS ADJS_RSN_CD , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'PYM', A.PYMN_AMNT, 0)) AS PYM_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'PYM', A.VAT_AMNT, 0)) AS PYM_VAT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'BCK', A.PYMN_AMNT, 0)) AS BCK_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'BCK', A.VAT_AMNT, 0)) AS BCK_VAT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'RFN', A.PYMN_AMNT, 0)) AS RFN_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'RFN', A.VAT_AMNT, 0)) AS RFN_VAT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'RFNR', A.PYMN_AMNT, 0)) AS RFNR_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'RFNR', A.VAT_AMNT, 0)) AS RFNR_VAT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'FNTT', A.PYMN_AMNT, 0)) AS FNTT_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'FNTT', A.VAT_AMNT, 0)) AS FNTT_VAT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'FNTF', A.PYMN_AMNT, 0)) AS FNTF_AMNT , SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'FNTF', A.VAT_AMNT, 0)) AS FNTF_VAT FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A WHERE A.PYMN_CD IN ( 'PYM', 'BCK', 'RFN', 'RFNR', 'FNTT', 'FNTF' ) AND A.BILL_YM = #{WORK_YM} GROUP BY A.BILL_YM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , A.BILL_ITEM_CD , A.BILL_RFLC_IND_CD , NVL(A.PYMN_MTHD_CD, 'X') , NVL(A.PYMN_DTL_MTHD_CD, 'X') ) PYM WHERE INV.BILL_YM = PYM.BILL_YM(+) AND INV.SVC_CNTR_NO = PYM.SVC_CNTR_NO(+) AND INV.BILL_ITEM_CD = PYM.BILL_ITEM_CD(+) AND INV.BILL_RFLC_IND_CD= PYM.BILL_RFLC_IND_CD(+) AND INV.DUEDAT_DATE = PYM.DUEDAT_DATE(+)
